@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: loadUser ∧ async ∧ await
P: missing_id → next(err) ∧ db.findUser → next(err) ∧ not_found → next(err) ∧ audit.log ∧ cache.set
V: minimal_change ∧ async ∧ await
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: loadUser and async and await.
Plan: missing_id then next(err) and db.findUser then next(err) and not_found then next(err) and audit.log and cache.set.
Verify: minimal_change and async and await.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.
